title: panicum puberulum
intro: Panicum puberulum, also known as the hairy panic grass, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as treating fever, respiratory issues, and skin infections, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. Panicum puberulum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and sometimes used as a poultice to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions.
